articles.title: Colby Covington on White House card, Kamaru Usman & Jorge Masvidal, UFC VILLAN | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Colby Covington officially makes his DEBUT on the Daniel Cormier SHOW! Colby goes in on being left off the White House card, and details his rivalries between him and UFC superstars Jorge Masvidal and Kamaru Usman. Covington also discusses his time in collegiate wrestling and how he became one of the best wrestlers in the country. Colby then reveals to DC that he was roommates with Jon Jones in college and talks about how it was to live with him. And don't miss Covington's thoughts on the White House card, President Donald Trump, his RAF wrestling career, the Justin Gaethje and Ilia Topuria fight, and so much more! All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Daniel Cormier REACTS to Carlos Ulberg KNOCKING OUT Jiri Prochazka, Josh Hokit's INSANE fight
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg KNOCKED OUT Jiri Prochazka in one of the craziest finishes of the year, and Daniel Cormier IS BACK live from the octagon in Miami, Florida after UFC 327! Cormier breaks down Ulberg's massive victory and reacts to him becoming the NEW light heavyweight champion. Plus, DC breaks down two incredible fights: Paolo Costa getting a TKO win vs. Azamat Murzakanov and Josh Hokie beating Curtis Blaydes in an INCREDIBLE fight that went to a decision. And don't miss DC's take on the Josh Hokit vs. Derrick Lewis fight on the White House card, the reveal of what the octagon will look like in Washington D.C., and all the exciting fights that went down at UFC 327 in Miami! All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms!
